data.name: Lustwick Duchy
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Lustwick Duchy

Lustwick Duchy is an adult adventure game. You came here to escape. To disappear. After betraying the powerful organization you once served and stealing a mysterious artifact, you fled deep into unfamiliar lands, hoping to outrun your past. Exhausted and on the brink of collapse, you found shelter in a secluded cottage, where Aria, enigmatic, secretive (and attractive), offered you a place to rest. But peace is never permanent. As you settle into this new life, shadows begin to stir, and the secrets of the Lustwick Duchy reveal themselves.

Explore the Duchy

A land of beauty, danger, and forgotten mysteries. Every step uncovers something new, a hidden ruin, an ancient legend, a strange occurrence that defies logic. Wander freely and delve into the region’s untold stories. Whether you seek adventure, answers, or simply a moment of quiet, the Duchy has something waiting for you.

Meet Its Inhabitants

Encounter a cast of unique personalities—some kind, some dangerous, and some who defy simple labels. Each will have a story to tell, a task to complete, a mini game to play, and of course a reward to unlock.

Satisfy your Lust

The Lustwick Duchy isn’t just a place of secrets and danger, it's above all a place of desire. As you grow closer to its inhabitants, opportunities for intimacy arise. Flirt, seduce, and build deep, meaningful relationships…
(Yes, the game game be played with one hand only)

data.short_description: Lustwick Duchy is an adult point-and-click adventure set in a medieval fantasy world where you play as a thief on the run, and straight into trouble. Explore a land full of secrets, charm its inhabitants (in every sense of the word), and see just how deep the rabbit hole goes.
